case_title: DWIGHT FINANCIAL, INC. VS PRAKASH, EDWIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,360.00 FILED BY DWIGHT FINANCIAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PRAKASH, EDWIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRAKASH, EDWIN
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO PRAKASH, EDWIN RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF RECEIVED, REQUESTING THAT EXHIBITS BE MAILED TO THEM. CLERK RESPONDED, EXHIB ITS CAN NOT BE MAILED,SHOULD BE CLAIMED IN PERSON.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DWIGHT FINANCIAL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRAKASH, EDWIN $1,341.49 PRINCIPAL, $136.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,477.49, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
